title: Europe Split Over Trump's Iran War, Spain Leads Defiance
summary_full: Europe is sharply divided on how to view fighting in West Asia and subsequent pressure on the global energy trade, which has seen fuel and gas prices increases worldwide.
summary_public: Europe is sharply divided on how to view fighting in West Asia and subsequent pressure on the global energy trade, which has seen fuel and gas prices increases worldwide.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: pressure on the global energy trade
